LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsDefaultCountryIdEnabled.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enable/disable setting default country id on customer profile update.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.DefaultCountryId.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select the default country to save its ID, which will be used to append the country code to the phone number.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.PickUpStoreRadius.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set number of radius from which you want to find Pickup Collections

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.PickUpStoreRadius.Required
LocaleResource.Value: Please set Positive Number for Pickup store Radius.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.SelectedCustomerRoleIdsForPickup.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select customer roles for pick up store functionality.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.GeoLocationApiUsername.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enter Username to be used in Geo Location API username parameter.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.PickupCustomAttributeId.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select attribute used to store Pick up store code.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Nop.Customization.StaffCustomerRoleOrder.Configure.Tab
LocaleResource.Value: Staff Customer Role Order Rule Configure

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.TotalOrderNo.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set total numbers of order staff customer has been allowed for.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.TotalOrderNo.Required
LocaleResource.Value: Please set positive Total number of Order.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.CustomerRoleId.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select customer role on which order rule will be applied.

LocaleResource.Name: Checkout.OrderTotalNoExceedCustomerStaff
LocaleResource.Value: You have already reached to your order limit for this calendar month

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.Catalog.Categories.IntegrationValues.SaveBeforeEdit
LocaleResource.Value: You need to save Categories before you add Integration Values.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.PostNetStoreDelivery.PostalCodeAddress.NotFound
LocaleResource.Value: Location for provided Postal code was not Found.

LocaleResource.Value: Address is invalid please select another address.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.PostNetStoreDelivery.AlreadyExist
LocaleResource.Value: Address with specified details already Exist

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.Catalog.Manufacturers.IntegrationValues.SaveBeforeEdit
LocaleResource.Value: You need to save Manufacturers before you can add Integration Values for this manufacturer page.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.ShippingAddressValidation.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enter API For Shipping Address Validation

LocaleResource.Name: Search.SearchBox.Province
LocaleResource.Value: Please select your suburb, province and postal code combination

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.ShippingAddressValidation.Field.Term
LocaleResource.Value: Please enter search term to get suburb combinations

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.ShippingAddressValidation.Field.State
LocaleResource.Value: Please select any state to get suburb combinations

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.ConsultantRoleId.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select Role of customer on which you want to show Additional features. (User Profile Additional Fields, Awards, Events , Gifts, Reports)

LocaleResource.Name: Account.UserProfileAdditionalInfo.BankName.Information
LocaleResource.Value: Annique has a very dynamic Compensation Plan whereby you can earn extra income and not just your 20% off invoice discount.By completing your banking details, you enable us to pay in any extra discount straight into your bank on a monthly basis.

LocaleResource.Name: Account.UserProfileAdditionalInfo.BankName.Information.Note
LocaleResource.Value: Note: We don’t pay additional discount into a credit card. Please supply bank account information.

LocaleResource.Name: Account.UserProfileAdditionalInfo.Accept
LocaleResource.Value: I agree with the terms of Agreement

LocaleResource.Name: Account.UserProfileAdditionalInfo.ConsultantAgreement.Prompt.Message
LocaleResource.Value: Please remember to Accept the Consultant Agreement on your Profile

LocaleResource.Name: Account.UserProfileAdditionalInfo.ProfileValidation.Message
LocaleResource.Value: Please complete your Profile before Checkout

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.CommonJs.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Configure Common my app js for all reports.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.LoginTimeLimit.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set the number of minutes to logout user automatically if no activity.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.Configuration.AnniqueReports.Added
LocaleResource.Value: The new Report has been added successfully.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.Configuration.AnniqueReports.Deleted
LocaleResource.Value: The Report has been deleted successfully.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.Configuration.AnniqueReports.Updated
LocaleResource.Value: The Report has been updated successfully.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.AnniqueReport.Fields.AclCustomerRoles.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select customer roles for which the report will be shown. Leave empty if you want this report to be visible to all users.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.AnniqueReport.Fields.Published.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check to publish this report (visible in store). Uncheck to unpublish (report not available in store).

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.AnniqueReport.Fields.DisplayOrder.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set the report's display order. 1 represents the top of the list.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.AnniqueReport.Fields.IsMenuOption.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check to make this report as menu option (visible in my account). Uncheck to display as normal report list (report not available in menu options of myaccount).

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.AnniqueReport.Fields.TabOrder.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set the menu option display order(Set display order greater than 160).

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.AnniqueReport.Fields.IncludeReportCommonJs.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Flog to include/exclude ReportCommon js from annique configuration settings.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.AnniqueReport.Fields.IncludeReportParameters.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Flag for Print dive , refresh button and report parameters.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.AnniqueReport.Fields.SeName.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set a search engine friendly page name e.g. 'some-report-name' to make your page URL 'http://www.yourStore.com/some-report-name'. Leave empty to generate it automatically based on the name of the report.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.AnniqueReport.Fields.SelectedHiddenFields.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select the hidden fields for reports.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.AnniqueReport.Fields.PubliclyHostedPage.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: When checked, the report will be hosted publicly and accessible via a direct report URL. This report will not be visible in the My Account menu or the reports list.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.Configuration.AnniqueReports.Parameters.SaveBeforeEdit
LocaleResource.Value: Save Report before add/update Report Parameters

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.Configuration.AnniqueReports.ParameterValues.SaveBeforeEdit
LocaleResource.Value: Save Parameter before add/update Parameter Values

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.ReportParameter.Fields.DisplayOrder.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set the parameter's display order. 1 represents the top of the list.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.ReportParameterValue.Fields.Name.Required
LocaleResource.Value: Name of Parameter Value is Required.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.ReportParameterValue.Fields.IsPreSelected.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Determines whether this value is pre-selected for the Parameter.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.ReportParameterValue.Fields.DisplayOrder.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set the parameter value's display order. 1 represents the top of the list.

LocaleResource.Name: Public.Username.NotExist
LocaleResource.Value: No Customer found with provided username

LocaleResource.Value: There are no bookings to display

LocaleResource.Value: Would you like to make a booking for yourself?

LocaleResource.Value: You are not authorized to access this Giftcard

LocaleResource.Name: Award.RedeemNote
LocaleResource.Value: The Award amount must be redeemed on one order, it cannot be redeemed on multiple orders.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsOTP.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check to enable OTP functionality. Uncheck to make disable functionality.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.OTPApiUrl.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Set Api url for Otp generation

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsStageEnvType.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check to make parameter staging=true in Otp Api. Uncheck to make parameter staging=false in Otp Api.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Otp.Success.Message
LocaleResource.Value: Otp Sent! Your OTP has been send Via

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Otp.Valid.Message
LocaleResource.Value: OTP Verified: Your OTP is valid.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Otp.Invalid.Message
LocaleResource.Value: Invalid OTP: "The OTP you have entered is not valid"

LocaleResource.Value: You are not authorized to redeem this voucher

LocaleResource.Value: Please review your cart as some product(s) are not available.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.AdminCustomerId.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select customer which will be used to send private messages.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.SelectedExcludeCategoryIds.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select categories which you want to exclude from product also purchased.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.CustomCacheExpireTime.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Specify custom cache time in minutes.

LocaleResource.Name: SpecialOffer.Warning.Message
LocaleResource.Value: You have unclaimed offers—don't miss out! Claim them before proceeding to checkout.

LocaleResource.Name: SpecialOffer.AddToCart.Warning
LocaleResource.Value: Please select a product before adding to the cart.

LocaleResource.Name: ShoppingCart.DiscountCouponCode.SpecialDiscountAccess.Error
LocaleResource.Value: You can apply only one special voucher to your order.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsEmailVerification.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enable/Disable Email verification using E-mailable API.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.EmailableApiKey.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Please provide api key used for emailable api.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.EmailableApi.Validation.Message
LocaleResource.Value: This email is not deliverable. Please enter a correct email address.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.PasswordResetApi.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Please provide password reset API endpoint.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.PasswordResetApiKey.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Please provide api key used for password reset api.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.PasswordResetMessageTemplateId.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select Message template which will be used for password reset message.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsStagingModeForPasswordReset.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check to add staging=true in password Api json body. Uncheck to exclude staging property from password reset Api json body.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsPasswordResetEnabled.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check to enable password reset by sms functionality. Uncheck to make disable functionality.

LocaleResource.Name: Account.PasswordRecovery.SmsHasBeenSent
LocaleResource.Value: Sms with instructions has been sent to you.

LocaleResource.Name: Account.PasswordRecovery.SmsError
LocaleResource.Value: We are not able to sent sms right now, Try sometime later.

LocaleResource.Value: The new custom shipping rule has been added successfully.

LocaleResource.Value: Add a new custom shipping rule

LocaleResource.Value: back to custom shipping rule list

LocaleResource.Value: The Custom shipping rule has been deleted successfully.

LocaleResource.Value: The custom shipping rule has been updated successfully.

LocaleResource.Name: Plugins.Shipping.FixedByWeightByTotal.Fields.AclCustomerRoles.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Select customer roles for which the rule will be applied.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsCustomShippingRule.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enable/disable Custom shipping rule funtionality.If enabled then Custom shipping rule will be applied otherwise default shipping rule will be applied.

LocaleResource.Name: ActivityLog.EditCustomerRole.RemoveClientRole
LocaleResource.Value: Removed the CLIENT role from the customer roles as the customer was added as an affiliated link.

LocaleResource.Name: Account.Register.Fields.Phone.Required
LocaleResource.Value: The Phone number field is required.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsFullTextSearchEnabled.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enable/disable Full Text Search funtionality.If enabled then Full text stored procedure will be used for searching otherwise default Nop search logic will be used.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsTripEnable.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check to enable Trip promotion message functionality. Uncheck to make disable functionality.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.TripMessageTemplate.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Provide message to show on cart page.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.QualifyingAmount.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Provide amount which required to qualify for trip.

LocaleResource.Name: Account.PendingOrders.Tooltip
LocaleResource.Value: Complete payment for you pending orders

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsChatbotEnable.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Check to enable chatbot functionality. Uncheck to make disable functionality.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.PromptTemplate.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Provide Promt template which will be used for Ai

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.SelectedChatbotAccessRoleIds.Hint

LocaleResource.Value: Response which retured by open ai.

LocaleResource.Value: Status given by customer was response helpful or not.

LocaleResource.Name: Admin.ChatFeedbackModel.Fields.Username.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Username of customer who has given feedback.

LocaleResource.Value: Please select your reason for joining.

LocaleResource.Name: Account.Register.Fields.HeardAbout.Required

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.RegistrationValidationApiEndPoint.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enter the endpoint URL for the registration validation API.

LocaleResource.Value: Enter the API key used to authenticate with the validation service.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.PostRedirectUrl.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enter the Url on which user will be redirected after loggedin.

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsNopConsultantRegistration.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enable this setting to use the NOP-based consultant registration URL (/consultant-register) for the consultant link on the login page. If disabled, the system will use the legacy consultant registration URL (/new-consultant-registration)

LocaleResource.Name: Annique.Plugin.Fields.IsAdminAccessUrl.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Enable this setting to allow access url for consultant registration page for admins.

LocaleResource.Name: Consultant.Registration.FallbackError
LocaleResource.Value: An unexpected error occurred during Registration. Try again later.

LocaleResource.Name: Consultant.Registration.Warning.FallbackMessage
LocaleResource.Value: Already registered. Thank you for your interest...
